query:
SELECT
    sum_price::FLOAT8 / sum_calculated_living_weight::FLOAT8 AS price
FROM
    rafisklaget_weekly_sales
WHERE
    vessel_length_group = $1
    AND gear_group = $2
    AND species = $3
    AND condition = $4
    AND quality = $5
    AND sum_calculated_living_weight > 0
ORDER BY
    "year" DESC,
    week DESC
LIMIT
    1
